news.t: Covered Call ETFs Have Boomed – But Can They Be More?
How These ETFs Offer Current Income Without Sacrificing Performance
ProShares Launches S&P 500 High Income ETF

holdings.infoBox: ISPY is an equity ETF with a total of 512 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P 500 High Income ETF (ISPY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Daily Covered Call index. The fund tracks an index pursuing a daily covered call writing strategy on the stocks of the S&P 500 Index. The fund seeks generate a high level of income combined with the performance returns of the S&P 500 Index over the long term. ISPY was launched on Dec 18, 2023 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Covered Call ETFs Have Boomed – But Can They Be More?
data.text: Investors have plenty of reasons to celebrate the covered call ETF boom. Covered call strategies have offered new ways to add income to portfolios.

data.title: How These ETFs Offer Current Income Without Sacrificing Performance
data.text: At a time when the cost of living is rising and market volatility appears to be rising, too, investors may be looking for current income to bolster their portfolios. Current income can especially help...

data.title: ProShares Launches S&P 500 High Income ETF
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares launched the ProShares S&P 500 High Income ETF (CBOE: ISPY), the first ETF powered by a daily call options strategy.
